agent_output: {"integration_assessment":{"component_interactions":[{"from":"POST /validate","to":"SmartyStreets API","status":"risk","issue":"No retry logic on transient failures (network blips, 503s). A single failed call returns an error to the caller with no recovery attempt. Also no circuit breaker — if SmartyStreets is degraded, every inbound request will hang for up to 3s before failing, consuming threads/connections."},{"from":"/health","to":"SmartyStreets API","status":"risk","issue":"Health check couples liveness to an external dependency. If SmartyStreets has a brief outage, the orchestrator (k8s/ECS) may kill healthy pods, causing a cascading outage of the service itself. Recommend splitting into /healthz (liveness, always 200) and /readyz (readiness, checks SmartyStreets)."}],"contract_compliance":"No request ID propagated or generated — impossible to correlate a caller's complaint with internal logs. Any upstream trace context (e.g. X-Request-Id, traceparent) is silently dropped.","data_flow_integrity":"Input address is not logged and raw SmartyStreets response is not logged. When a customer disputes a validation result, there is zero forensic evidence to reconstruct what happened."},"observability_review":{"logging":{"coverage":"gaps","gaps":["No request ID / correlation ID in any log line — cannot trace a single request across systems","No duration logged for the SmartyStreets API call — cannot diagnose latency issues from logs alone","Input address not logged — cannot reproduce or investigate disputed results","Raw API response not logged (even at DEBUG level) — cannot determine if a bad result was due to service logic or upstream data","No structured logging apparent — grep-based debugging will be fragile","No log on error/timeout path — if SmartyStreets fails, there may be no log explaining why a request failed"]},"metrics":{"coverage":"minimal — single counter with no dimensions","gaps":["validation_requests_total lacks outcome labels (valid/invalid/error) — cannot calculate error rate or validity ratio","No latency histogram (e.g. validation_duration_seconds) — cannot set SLOs, cannot detect p99 degradation","No in-flight request gauge — cannot detect connection pool exhaustion or thread starvation","No metric for SmartyStreets error/timeout rate — cannot alert on upstream degradation independently"]},"tracing":{"coverage":"missing","gaps":["No distributed tracing integration (OpenTelemetry / Jaeger / Zipkin)","No span for the outbound SmartyStreets HTTP call","No trace context propagation from inbound request headers"]},"debugging_capability":"Poor. An on-call engineer at 3am would see 'Validation result: invalid' in logs with no request ID, no input, no duration, and no upstream response. They cannot determine whether the issue is in the service, in SmartyStreets, or in the caller's input. They would have to add ad-hoc logging and redeploy to investigate."},"resilience_assessment":{"failure_modes":[{"scenario":"SmartyStreets returns 5xx or network timeout","handling":"partial","recommendation":"3s timeout exists (good), but no retry with backoff for transient errors. Add 1 retry with jitter for 503/timeout, keeping total budget under 5s."},{"scenario":"SmartyStreets is fully down for extended period","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No circuit breaker. All requests will queue up waiting 3s each, exhausting connection pools. Add a circuit breaker (e.g. open after 5 consecutive failures, half-open after 30s) that fails fast and returns a clear 503 to callers."},{"scenario":"SmartyStreets responds with malformed / unexpected JSON","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No evidence of defensive parsing or error handling for unexpected response shapes. A schema change upstream could cause unhandled exceptions. Add response validation and a fallback error path."},{"scenario":"Burst traffic / load spike","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No rate limiting or request queuing. A traffic spike will fan out 1:1 to SmartyStreets, potentially hitting their rate limit and causing all requests to fail. Add client-side rate limiting or a bulkhead."},{"scenario":"SmartyStreets API key expiry or quota exhaustion","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No specific detection or alerting for 401/403 responses. These would silently appear as generic failures. Log and alert distinctly on auth errors."}],"retry_config":"None configured. Recommend 1 retry with exponential backoff + jitter for transient failures (5xx, timeout), total request budget ≤5s.","timeout_config":"3s on SmartyStreets call — reasonable. Ensure a slightly larger timeout on the inbound /validate endpoint (e.g. 5s) to account for retry overhead and avoid the caller timing out before the service does.","circuit_breakers":"None. Must-have before production to prevent cascading failure during SmartyStreets outages.","graceful_degradation":"None. Service has only two modes: working and broken. Consider whether a cached recent result or a 'validation unavailable, try later' response is acceptable for the business."},"operational_readiness":{"deployment_ready":false,"rollback_capable":true,"rollback_plan":"Redeploy previous container image. Acceptable for a stateless service with no database migrations. Verify image tag is pinned and previous image is retained in registry.","monitoring_coverage":"Insufficient. The single counter without labels cannot support alerting on error rate, latency degradation, or upstream failures. No dashboard can be built from current metrics.","on_call_documentation":"No evidence of runbook or on-call documentation. An engineer unfamiliar with the service would not know: (1) what SmartyStreets is, (2) how to check its status, (3) what the expected error rate is, (4) how to rotate the API key, (5) escalation contacts.","new_infrastructure_required":{"new_env_vars":[],"new_services":[],"new_queues_topics":[],"config_changes":["Add Prometheus histogram metric validation_duration_seconds","Add outcome label to validation_requests_total","Consider adding circuit breaker configuration (thresholds, timeouts)"],"infra_provisioning":["Alerting rules for error rate and p99 latency need to be provisioned in monitoring stack"]},"database_safety":{"has_migrations":false,"reversible":false,"data_preserving":false,"large_table_impact":false,"details":"Stateless service, no database involved."},"verdict":"NOT READY"},"escalations":[{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"No request correlation ID, no latency histogram, no outcome labels on metrics, no distributed tracing","reason":"Cannot set SLOs, cannot alert on degradation, cannot debug individual requests. On-call engineer has near-zero visibility. This is not operable.","routed_to":"Coach K"},{"type":"infrastructure_gap","issue":"No circuit breaker or retry logic for external SmartyStreets dependency","reason":"A SmartyStreets outage will cascade into full service unavailability with 3s latency on every request, exhausting upstream connection pools. This is a predictable production incident waiting to happen.","routed_to":"Coach K"},{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"No runbook or on-call documentation","reason":"No engineer can operate this service without tribal knowledge. API key rotation, SmartyStreets status page, expected baseline metrics — none documented.","routed_to":"Coach K"}],"confidence":{"level":90,"high_confidence_areas":["Observability gaps are clear and objectively measurable","Resilience gaps (no circuit breaker, no retry) are factual","Health check coupling risk is a well-known anti-pattern"],"low_confidence_areas":["Internal error handling and parsing logic — not reviewed at code level","Actual deployment pipeline and image retention policy — assumed standard","Whether business requirements allow graceful degradation (cached/deferred validation)"],"assumptions":["Service is stateless with no database","Deployment is container-based with orchestration (k8s or similar)","SmartyStreets is the sole external dependency","No code-level review was performed; assessment is based on the described architecture"]}}
